data.name: TagSelfParentAttempt
data.value: Tag {0} has itself in Parents, which is invalid.

data.name: TagOrphanAttempt
data.value: Tag {0} has no parents specified and is not top-level, which is invalid.

data.name: TagNameIsBlank
data.value: Tag {0} has no parents specified and is not top-level, which is invalid.

data.name: TagDatabaseInvalidFile
data.value: This is not a valid SQLite database.

data.name: TagDatabaseInvalidStructure
data.value: This is not a valid database file for the Tag Hierarchy Manager application.

data.name: TagDatabaseInvalidFileExt
data.value: File extension must be .thdb.

data.name: TagDatabaseNotInitialised
data.value: The tag hierarchy database has not been initialised.

data.name: TagDatabaseEmptyParameters
data.value: No usable parameters received.

data.name: TagDatabaseFilePathEmpty
data.value: File path cannot be empty.

data.name: TagDatabaseDeletingRequiredSetting
data.value: This setting is required and cannot be deleted.

data.name: TagDatabaseTagHasChildren
data.value: The tag requested has child tags and cannot currently be deleted. Delete its children first and try again.

data.name: TagDatabaseTagNotFound
data.value: The tag requested does not exist in the database.

data.name: TagDatabaseSettingKeyExists
data.value: Setting {0} already exists in the database.

data.name: TagDatabaseSettingKeyNotFound
data.value: Setting {0} was not found in the settings table.

data.name: TagDatabaseSqliteGeneric
data.value: Cannot execute function on database due to SQLite error. Error code: {0}

data.name: ImporterMusicBeeIndentExcessive
data.value: Excessive indent was detected at line {0}.

data.name: ImporterMusicBeeIndentUneven
data.value: Uneven indent was found at line {0}.

data.name: ImporterMusicBeePopOutOfRange
data.value: Process exited abruptly due to an error with handling the indent. (current line's indent level was greater than the amount of tags in the parent stack)

data.name: ImporterMusicBeeStartsWithSpace
data.value: Tag hierarchy starts with a space, which is not valid for a tag hierarchy template's structure.

data.name: ImporterMusicBeeTabsDetected
data.value: Tab characters were detected, which is an invalid structure for MusicBee tag hierarchy templates.
